title: Misappropriation of Name, Voice, Signature, Photograph, or Likeness—Use in
text:
Connection With News, Public Affairs, or Sports Broadcast or Account, or Political
Campaign (Civ. Code, § 3344(d))
1805. Affirmative Defense to Misappropriation of Name, Voice, Signature, Photograph, or
Likeness—First Amendment (Comedy III)
